title: Fluffy Cat on Floaty
prompt: A cute, big, fluffy white cat floating on a pool floaty, wearing yellow boxer shorts and yellow sunglasses. The cat has a shiny Gucci gold chain around its neck and is holding a glass of red wine in one paw. The pool water is bright blue under clear, sunny skies, giving a warm, luxurious, cinematic summer vibe. Captured with an 85mm lens, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, realistic shadows and reflections. --ar 9:16 --v 7
